description: Conversation for Action (CfA) state machine — five states governing phase transitions. The work in each phase happens inside a skill (intent-alignment, planning, execute) that runs to completion in a single invocation and writes ./.phase-outcome.json with a terminal outcome (APPROVE, REALIGN, REPLAN, or WITHDRAW). The state machine only gates transitions between phases.

intent.description: Intent Alignment. The intent-alignment skill runs to completion and emits APPROVE (advance to PLAN) or WITHDRAW.

planning.description: Planning. The planning skill runs to completion and emits APPROVE (advance to EXECUTE), REALIGN (backtrack to INTENT), or WITHDRAW.

execution.description: Execution. The execute skill runs to completion and emits APPROVE (advance to DONE), REPLAN (backtrack to PLAN), REALIGN (backtrack to INTENT), or WITHDRAW.
